fields.description: Controls how discounts are calculated: Single applies one discount, Triple Compounded applies three discounts sequentially.
fields.label: Discount Type

fields.description: Ensures PAN numbers are unique across all customers and suppliers to prevent duplicate entries.
fields.label: Enforce PAN Uniqueness

fields.description: Requires non-stock items (except fixed assets) to have an expense account configured.
fields.label: Enforce Expense Account for Non-Stock Items

fields.description: Block Purchase Invoice submission when Supplier GSTIN and Company GSTIN are the same.
fields.label: Block Purchase Invoice with Same GSTIN

fields.description: When enabled, is_primary_address and is_shipping_address are forced to 0 on every Address save.
fields.label: Suppress Preferred Billing & Shipping Address

fields.description: Restrict UOM selection in Stock Entry grid to Item's allowed UOMs only.
fields.label: Enable UOM Restriction

fields.description: Show conversion tags/badges in Stock Entry grid for quick reference.
fields.label: Enable Conversion Tags

fields.description: Replace ERPNext's 'Update Items' on Sales/Purchase Orders with BNS version (supports Price List Rate + Discounts).
fields.label: Enable BNS Update Items for Orders

fields.description: Requires stock items in invoices to either update stock directly or reference a delivery note/purchase receipt.
fields.label: Enforce Stock Update or Reference

fields.description: Allow warehouses to individually disallow negative stock even when global 'Allow Negative Stock' is enabled.
fields.label: Enable Per-Warehouse Negative Stock Control

fields.description: When ERPNext Stock Settings has 'Allow Negative Stock' OFF, allow selected roles to submit stock documents with negative stock up to the cutoff date.
fields.label: Allow Negative Stock Override

fields.description: Negative stock is allowed only for documents with posting date on or before this date. Leave blank for no cutoff.
fields.label: Cutoff Date

fields.description: Roles that can bypass the negative stock restriction.
fields.label: Override Roles

fields.description: When enabled, Purchase Receipt and Purchase Invoice submissions require a supplier invoice attachment. If the net total exceeds the e-Waybill threshold (from GST Settings), an e-Waybill attachment is also required. If a PI is created from a PR, the PI is exempt (documents are expected on the PR).
fields.label: Enforce Purchase Document Attachments

fields.description: Require BOM for Manufacture Stock Entry and enforce that components match the BOM exactly.
fields.label: Enforce BOM for Manufacture

fields.description: Allow ±% variance in component quantities instead of requiring exact BOM quantities during Stock Entry validation.
fields.label: Enable BOM Quantity Variance

fields.description: Default allowed variance (±%). Individual BOM items can override this value.
fields.label: Default Variance (%)

fields.description: Restrict document submission across all categories (Stock, Transaction, Order) to specific roles.
fields.label: Restrict Document Submission

fields.description: Roles that can submit documents in addition to System Manager.
fields.label: Allowed Roles
Know Your Vendor Form Template
fields.description: Upload the blank KYV form template. Suppliers can download this from the Supplier list view.

fields.options: Upload the blank Know Your Vendor (KYV) form here. A Download KYV Form button will appear on the Supplier list view for users to download this template.

fields.description: How often the scheduler should post contra Journal Entries for linked Customer/Supplier pairs whose party accounts carry opposite-signed balances. Runs via the daily scheduler tick; Weekly fires every 7 days, Monthly on the 1st, Quarterly on Apr 1 / Jul 1 / Oct 1 / Jan 1, Yearly on Apr 1. Leave Disabled to only run from the BNS Dashboard manual action.
fields.label: Auto Square-Off Schedule

fields.description: Show a warning dialog when an accountant selects a party on a Payment Entry and the linked counter-party has an open outstanding on the opposite side. Helps catch bank receipts posted against the wrong side of a linked Customer/Supplier pair.
fields.label: Warn When Posting Against Linked Party's Wrong Side

fields.description: Cost Center used on system-generated Common Party square-off Journal Entries. If blank, the Company default Cost Center is used.
fields.label: Square-Off Cost Center

fields.description: Timestamp of the last scheduled auto square-off run. Read-only; updated by the scheduler.
fields.label: Last Auto Square-Off Run
Auto Payment Reconciliation (FIFO)
fields.description: Wraps ERPNext's Payment Reconciliation tool around the Common Party square-off. When enabled, open Sales/Purchase Invoices get FIFO-allocated against their Payment Entries and the square-off contra JV, so Balance Sheet, Trial Balance, Accounts Receivable, and Accounts Payable all agree after the run.

Before the scheduler / manual action posts any contra JV, run Payment Reconciliation across all customers and suppliers. Clears pre-existing unlinked invoice/payment pairs so the crossed-balance calculation sees the true net.
fields.label: Run Payment Reconciliation Before Square-Off

fields.description: After the contra JV posts, run Payment Reconciliation again so the JV's Debtors/Creditors legs get FIFO-allocated against the open Sales/Purchase Invoices on each side. This is what actually closes the underlying invoices — without it, the JV just shifts balances and invoices stay 'outstanding'.
fields.label: Run Payment Reconciliation After Square-Off

fields.description: Include Payment Entries marked is_advance in the FIFO allocation pool. Matches the running-account workflow where advances should be tied to invoices as they are received.
fields.label: Include Advance Payment Entries in FIFO Allocation

fields.description: Historical window the reconciliation considers when fetching unreconciled invoices and payments. 'All time' catches every legacy open item. 'Last 2 Fiscal Years' skips older ledger data. 'Since Accounting Rewrite Cutoff' pins to the existing BNS Branch Accounting cutoff so legacy periods stay untouched.
fields.label: Reconciliation Window
fields.options:
All time
Last 2 Fiscal Years
Since Accounting Rewrite Cutoff

fields.description: Which parties to reconcile each run. 'All Customers + All Suppliers' is comprehensive; 'Only Parties With Crossed Balances' narrows to just the pairs the square-off touches; 'Only Party-Linked Parties' restricts to parties that appear in a Party Link record.
fields.label: Reconciliation Scope
fields.options:
All Customers + All Suppliers
Only Parties With Crossed Balances
Only Party-Linked Parties

fields.description: Timestamp of the last scheduled auto payment reconciliation run. Read-only; updated by the scheduler.
fields.label: Last Auto Reconciliation Run
